Associate Attorney Email: info@chucksternmurphylawfirm.com Phone: 415-217-9456[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″][vc_column_text css=””]Rico Ralph brings a wealth of experience to our firm as a fourth-year attorney specializing in defense matters. With over 2.5 years of trial experience, Carmen has successfully handled a wide range of cases from discovery to trial preparation. She has a proven track record of excellence, having already been involved in seven trials as a second chair. Carmen holds a bachelor’s degree from Mount Saint Mary’s University.
